faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Answers to the {count} questions customers ask most. Can't find what you're looking for?
faq.sidebarDesc: Our team will get back to you within a few hours.
faq.ctaDesc: Didn't find what you were looking for? Our team is here for you.
faq.shippingQ1: How quickly do you ship orders?
faq.shippingA1: Orders placed before 2pm on a working day ship the same day. Everything else goes out the next working day at the latest. We always e-mail you a tracking number when your parcel is on its way.
faq.shippingQ2: Which delivery services do you offer?
faq.shippingA2: We work with three carriers: PPL (1–2 working days, 129 CZK), Zásilkovna with a pickup point of your choice (89 CZK) and DPD (1–2 working days, 119 CZK). Shipping is free on orders over 1,500 CZK.
faq.shippingA3: Yes, we deliver anywhere in Slovakia. The price and delivery time depend on the carrier you pick. You'll see the exact details when choosing shipping in the cart.
faq.shippingQ4: What if my parcel doesn't arrive?
faq.shippingA4: If your parcel hasn't arrived within 5 working days of dispatch, contact us at info@dodelat.cz or by phone. We'll check with the carrier straight away and sort it out.
faq.returnsQ1: How long do I have to return goods?
faq.returnsA1: Beyond the statutory 14-day period we offer extended returns up to 30 days from delivery. Just e-mail us and send the goods back to our address. The buyer covers the cost of return shipping.
faq.returnsQ2: What condition must returned goods be in?
faq.returnsA2: Goods should be unused, in the original packaging and complete (including all accessories and documentation). If the goods have been used or damaged, we reserve the right to reduce the refund accordingly.
faq.returnsA3: Report the complaint by e-mail to info@dodelat.cz with your order number, a description of the fault and a photo. We settle complaints within 30 days. All goods carry the statutory 24-month warranty.
faq.returnsQ4: When do I get my money back?
faq.returnsA4: We refund within 14 days of receiving the returned goods, using the same payment method you paid with — card, bank account, or otherwise as agreed.
faq.paymentQ1: Which payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentA1: We accept card payments online (Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay), bank transfer in advance, and cash on delivery (39 CZK surcharge). The payment gateway is secured with SSL encryption.
faq.paymentA2: Absolutely. Card payments are handled by a certified payment gateway with 3D Secure. Your card number never passes through our servers at any point.
faq.paymentQ3: When will the payment leave my account?
faq.paymentA3: With online card payments the money is taken as soon as the order is confirmed. With bank transfer we wait for the payment to land before dispatching your parcel.
faq.productsA1: Yes, we sell only genuine Apple accessories and products from verified distributors. Every piece goes through a quality check before it ships.
faq.productsA2: All goods come with the statutory 24-month warranty. It covers manufacturing defects and faulty materials, not damage caused by improper use.
faq.productsA3: Our current range is new goods only. If we consider adding refurbished products, we'll let you know through the newsletter.
faq.productsQ4: Can I try a product before buying?
faq.productsA4: We don't run a physical store at the moment. You can try any product after delivery and return it within 30 days, no reason needed, if you're not happy.
faq.supportQ1: How can I contact customer support?
faq.supportA1: We're available at info@dodelat.cz, by phone on +420 737 565 577 (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm, Sat 10am–2pm), or via the chat on the site. We usually reply within a few hours.
faq.supportQ2: How long does an e-mail reply take?
faq.supportA2: We aim to reply within 4 working hours. If we're dealing with a lot of enquiries, we'll reply by the next working day at the latest.
faq.supportA3: Yes. Once your parcel ships you'll get an e-mail with a tracking link for the carrier you chose. You can also follow your order status in your customer account.
faq.securityQ1: How do you protect my personal data?
faq.securityA1: We process your data in line with the GDPR. We don't pass it to third parties for marketing. All communication is SSL-encrypted. You'll find the details in our Privacy Policy.
faq.securityQ2: Do you store my card number?
faq.securityA2: No. We never store card numbers and have no access to them. Payments are handled exclusively by a certified, PCI DSS-compliant payment gateway.

contact.title: Contact
contact.sentDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as we can, usually within 24 hours.

about.title: About us
about.heroDesc: A Czech shop for premium Apple accessories. Running since 2023.
about.storyTitle: It started with frustration over poor-quality accessories
about.storyPara1: Tired of cheap knock-offs that fell apart within a week, we set out to build a shop where quality isn't a compromise. HackPack was founded with a single goal — premium Apple accessories at fair prices.
about.storyPara2: Today we supply hundreds of happy customers across Czechia and Slovakia. We've personally tested every product in our catalogue.
about.value1Desc: We only sell genuine Apple accessories from verified suppliers.
about.value2Desc: Orders placed before 2pm go out the same day.
about.value3Desc: Return anything within 30 days of delivery, no questions asked.
about.value4Desc: Behind every order there are real people who are here for you.
